name: customer-onboarding-multi-step-form-application
description: Customer Onboarding Multi-Step Form Application — Generate runnable production ready code for the uploaded user stories

features.name: Personal Information
features.description: Personal Information: firstName [Required, alphabetic characters only], lastName [Required, alphabetic characters only], dateOfBirth (date) [Required, must be 18 years or older], nationality (dropdown) [Required]

features.name: Contact Details
features.description: Contact Details: email (email) [Required, must be valid email format], phone (phone) [Required, must be valid UK phone number], addressLine1 [Required], addressLine2, city [Required], postcode [Required, valid UK postcode format]

features.name: Residency Information
features.description: Residency Information: ukResident (radio) [Required], visaType (dropdown) [Required if non-UK resident] {Show only if ukResident = No}, visaExpiryDate (date) [Required if non-UK resident, must be future date] {Show only if ukResident = No}, proofOfResidency (file) [Required, PDF/JPG/PNG only, max 5MB]

features.name: Military Service Information
features.description: Military Service Information: servedInMilitary (radio) [Required], branch (dropdown) [Required if served in military] {Show only if servedInMilitary = Yes}, serviceStartDate (date) [Required if served in military] {Show only if servedInMilitary = Yes}, serviceEndDate (date) [Required if served in military, must be after start date] {Show only if servedInMilitary = Yes}, dischargeDocument (file) [Optional, PDF/JPG/PNG only, max 5MB] {Show only if servedInMilitary = Yes}
